education_required: Diploma in Mechanical / Tool & Die Making / B.Tech/B.E in Mechanical / Tool & Die Making
raw_text:
51. Die Shop Manager

Job Summary  
Manages die manufacturing and maintenance operations, ensuring high -quality die 
production and minimal downtime.  
Key Respo nsibilities  
• Oversee die manufacturing, repair, and maintenance  
• Ensure die performance and longevity  
• Manage shop floor operations and workforce  
• Coordinate with production and quality teams  
• Optimize die processes and reduce downtime  
• Implement best practices in die management  
Required Skills  
• Expertise in die manufacturing and maintenance  
• Leadership and operations management  
• Troubleshooting and process optimization  
• Strong coordination skills  
Qualification  
• Diploma / B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Tool & Die  
Experience  
• 8–15 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹50,000 – ₹1,10,000 per month
